summary: Completed comprehensive testing of MVNO system improvements including line management, status colors, API logging, and OperadoraService integration. Fixed critical backend bug and verified all requested features are working correctly.

critical_bugs.issue: Database comparison bug in operadora_service.py using 'if db:' instead of 'if db is not None:'

minor_issues.issue: Dashboard stats show more data than expected (6 clients vs 4, 6 chips vs 5)
minor_issues.impact: Expected behavior due to test data accumulation

passed_tests: Lines page displays statistics cards (Total, Ativas, Pendentes, Bloqueadas)
Lines table shows line data with proper formatting
Status consultation modal opens and displays line details
Status colors working (ativo=green, pendente=yellow, bloqueado=red, erro=pink)
Block/unblock buttons functional with confirmation dialogs
Line activation via API with mock responses
Logs page displays statistics (Total, Ativações, Erros, Chamadas API)
Log detail modal shows API request/response details
MOCK indicator appears in logs using simulated API
Navigation between Dashboard, Lines, and Logs pages
API logging with detailed request/response tracking
Mock API responses with realistic success rates (70% success, 20% pending, 10% error)
